title: Minimal Fashion Magazine Cover AI
sourceTitle: Minimal Fashion Magazine Cover AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable minimal fashion magazine cover with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable minimal fashion magazine cover built around VOGUE. composition: stable composition, subject-led layout, controlled crop, strong focal hierarchy, and clean surrounding space for labels or supporting panels. style: Realistic photography or editorial photo language with natural materials, controlled retouching, and believable lighting. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing, adult subjects only, no face swap, no real-person likeness unless the user owns or has consent for the image subject: adult editorial model with elegant posture as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable wardrobe: tailored black suit and sculptural earrings. scene: white and deep emerald split background defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations. cover lines: "quiet luxury editorial lines" Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
